extra.reasoning: The property is monotonicity in back_pain: flipping back_pain from false to true (all else equal) must not lower acuity. Crucially, back_pain does not appear in any rule (r1–r6) nor in the default. The rules trigger only on leg_swelling, chest_pain, severe_headache, pallor, dyspnea, and confusion. Therefore, for any fixed assignment of the other six inputs, the set of firing rules, the priority/tie resolution, and thus the resulting acuity are completely independent of back_pain. Setting back_pain true leaves acuity exactly unchanged, which satisfies "no lower than before" (equality qualifies). Since acuity is invariant under back_pain across the entire input space, the monotonicity property holds with no counterexample.
